title: elaphoglossum lonchophyllum
intro: Elaphoglossum lonchophyllum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of epiphytic or terrestrial plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Elaphoglossum lonchophyllum has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and showing potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
